steps.title: Identify initial and target concentrations from the graph
steps.content: At the initial measurement (x = 0), the concentration is approximately 10 million cells per mL. We need to find the time when the concentration reaches 20 million cells per mL.

steps.title: Find the time value where concentration equals 20 million
steps.content: Locating the horizontal line at y = 20 on the graph, trace to where it meets the curve. Reading down vertically to the x-axis, this intersection occurs at approximately x = 35 minutes. That matches choice B — B is correct.
